abilities.name: The Dark Master (Aura)
abilities.description: The area of the battlefield within 6" of this model is considered to be within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

abilities.name: Shadow Form
abilities.description: At the start of the battle round, select one Shadow Form ability. Until the end of the battle round, this model has that ability.

stats.Keywords: Devastating Wounds, Hazardous, Ignores Cover, Psychic

abilities.name: Grotesque Regeneration
abilities.description: At the end of each phase, if a Beasts of Nurgle model in this unit has lost any wounds but is not destroyed, that model regains all of its lost wounds.

abilities.name: Brass Stampede
abilities.description: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this unit and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Bane of Cowards
abilities.description: Each time an enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ BLOODLETTERS

abilities.name: Bloodmaster
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: A Gory Path
abilities.description: Each time this model’s unit Consolidates, it can move up to 6" instead of up to 3".

abilities.name: Daemon Lord of Khorne (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ^^Khorne Legiones Daemonica^^ unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Relentless Carnage
abilities.description: At the end of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model and roll eight D6: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Split
abilities.description: Each time a ^^Blue Horror^^ model in this unit is destroyed, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, if this unit is not destroyed, roll one D6 for that model. On a 4+, add one ^^Brimstone Horror^^ model to this unit.

abilities.name: Sullen Malevolence (Aura)
abilities.description: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, if this unit contains one or more ^^Blue Horror^^ models, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that enemy unit by 1.

abilities.name: Exploding Horrors
abilities.description: Each time this unit is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it, then select one or more ^^Brimstone Horror^^ models in this unit. For each ^^Brimstone Horror^^ model you select, roll one D6: on a 4+, that model is destroyed and that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Eldritch Flames (Psychic)
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Changecaster
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Storm of Mutating Sorcery (Psychic)
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy Infantry unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ PINK HORRORS
■ BLUE HORRORS

abilities.name: Sunderer of Fortresses
abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a ^^**Vehicle^^**, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 1 (if that attack targets a ^^**Fortification^^**, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 2 instead).

stats.Keywords: Anti-INFANTRY 2+, Blast, Ignores Cover, Indirect Fire

abilities.name: Bastion of Firepower
abilities.description: Each time this model Remains Stationary, until the end of the turn, ranged weapons equipped by this model have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abilities.name: Searing Flames
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks made with an Acheron flame cannon. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Unrestrained Terror (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ^^**War Dog^^** model is within 6" of this model, it is affected by this ability. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one or more ^^**War Dog^^** units affected by this ability must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Macro-extinction Protocols
abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** unit, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that target is ^^**Titanic^^** or ^^**Towering^^**, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

abilities.name: Consumed with Hunger (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ^^**War Dog^^** model is within 6" of this model, each time that ^^**War Dog^^** model makes an attack that targets a ^^**Titanic^^** or ^^**Towering^^** unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Storm of Bolts
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one unit (excluding ^^**Monsters^^** and ^^**Vehicles^^**) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while this model is on the battlefield, that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Offerings for the Dark Gods (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ^^**War Dog^^** model is within 6" of this model, ranged weapons equipped by that ^^**War Dog^^** model have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Shock Charge
abilities.description: You can target this model with the Tank Shock Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Dark Fervour (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ^^**War Dog^^** model is within 6" of this model, ranged weapons equipped by that ^^**War Dog^^** model have the [ASSAULT] ability.

abilities.name: Repair Auto-simulacra
abilities.description: At the end of your Command phase, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

abilities.name: Grav-pinned
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, if an enemy ^^**Infantry^^** unit was hit by one or more of those attacks made with a graviton crusher, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is grav-pinned. While a unit is grav-pinned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Preysight (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ^^**War Dog^^** model is within 6" of this model, ranged weapons equipped by that ^^**War Dog^^** model have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

abilities.name: Swallow Energy (Psychic)
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds and Psychic Attacks.

abilities.name: Horrible Fascination (Psychic)
abilities.description: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, one PSYKER model from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to that PSYKER model and roll one D6: on a 1, that PSYKER model suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2-5, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; on a 6, that enemy unit is not eligible to shoot this phase.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ DAEMONETTES

abilities.name: Prince of Darkness (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit is within 6" of this model, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Unholy Vigour
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, this model has a 3+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Daemonic Lord
abilities.description: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Legiones Daemonica^^** Infantry units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

units.name: Daemon Prince of Chaos with wings

profile.name: Daemon Prince of Chaos with wings
keywords: Daemon Prince of Chaos with wings

abilities.name: Malefic Destruction
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the start of the Fight phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 3 to the Attacks characteristic of this model’s hellforged weapons.

abilities.name: Harbinger of Death
abilities.description:
Each time this model is selected to fight, select one of the following abilities. Until the end of the phase, this model’s hellforged weapons have that ability:
■ [LETHAL HITS]
■ [PRECISION]
■ [SUSTAINED HITS 1]

abilities.name: Horrifying Beauty
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of one of more units from your army with this ability must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result if that enemy unit is Below Half-strength.

abilities.name: Malefic Impact
abilities.description: Melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [^^Lance^^] ability.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Mounted Daemon**^^ units which share one of the following keywords with this model ^^**Khorne, Nurgle, Slaanesh, Tzeentch**^^

abilities.name: Daemonic Locus
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return 1 destroyed Bodyguard model, or D3 destroyed models with the ^^**Battleline**^^ keyword, to that unit.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description: This model can be attached to the following unit: ^^**Infantry Daemon**^^ units (excluding ^^**Possessed**^^ units) which share one of the following keywords with this model ^^**Khorne, Nurgle, Slaanesh, Tzeentch**^^

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ PLAGUEBEARERS

abilities.name: Blessed by the Plague God
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Tally of Pestilence
abilities.description: Keep a tally of how many enemy models are destroyed by NURGLE LEGIONES DAEMONICA models from your army during the battle. At the start of your Command phase, if this tally is 7 or more, you gain 1CP and the tally is reset to 0.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ FLAMERS

abilities.name: Blazing Warpfire (Psychic)
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] ability.

abilities.name: Flames of Change (Psychic)
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks, and roll one D6. On a 4+, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is aflame. While a unit is aflame, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

abilities.name: Manifestation of Destruction
abilities.description: This model cannot be your ^^Warlord^^ and cannot be given Enhancements.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ SCREAMERS

abilities.name: Fateskimmer
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

abilities.name: Rider of the Immaterial Winds
abilities.description: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if this model’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove that unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Shroud of Flies (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly NURGLE LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit is within 6" of this Fortification, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

abilities.name: Diseased Cover
abilities.description: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this FORTIFICATION, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

abilities.name: Soporific Musk
abilities.description: Each time an enemy unit (excluding ^^Monsters^^ and ^^Vehicles^^) within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army with this ability Falls Back, models in that enemy unit must take Desperate Escape tests. When doing so, if that enemy unit is also Battle-shocked, subtract 1 from each of those Desperate Escape tests.

abilities.name: Bounding Leaps
abilities.description: This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Hunters from the Warp
abilities.description: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ PINK HORRORS
■ BLUE HORRORS

abilities.name: Fluxmaster
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack is made against that unit, subtract 1 form the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Altered Reality (Psychic)
abilities.description: Once per battle round, after a Hit roll, a Wound roll or a saving throw is made for this model, you can change the result of that roll to a 6.

abilities.name: Daemon Lord of Nurgle (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ^^Nurgle Legiones Daemonica^^ unit is within 6" of this model, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Nurgle’s Rot (Psychic)
abilities.description: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12" of this model. Until the start of your next Movement phase, subtract 1 from the Toughness characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Cutting Down the Foe
abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if this unit made a Charge move this turn, improve the Strength and Damage characteristics of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ BEASTS OF NURGLE

abilities.name: Beast Handler
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit. In addition, once per battle, you can target that unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

abilities.name: Seed the Garden of Nurgle
abilities.description: At the end of your Movement phase, if this model is within one AREA TERRAIN feature, until the end of the battle, that AREA TERRAIN feature is considered to be within your army’s Shadow of Chaos.

abilities.name: Infernal Attendants
abilities.description: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly ^^**Daemon Infantry**^^ units, this model has the Lone Operative ability.

abilities.name: Font of Unreality
abilities.description: Each time an attack is allocated to a friendly ^^**Daemon**^^ unit within 3" of this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ DAEMONETTES

abilities.name: Harmonic Alignment
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, in your Command phase, you can return D3 destroyed Bodyguard models to that unit.

abilities.name: Discordant Disruption (Aura)
abilities.description: While an enemy ^^Psyker^^ unit is within 12" of this model, Psychic weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [HAZARDOUS] ability.

abilities.name: One Head Looks Forward
abilities.description: At the end of your Command phase, if this model is on the battlefield, take a Leadership test for this model; if that test is passed, you gain 1CP.

abilities.name: One Head Looks Back (Aura)
abilities.description: Each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12" of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP (this is not cumulative with any other rules that would increase the CP cost of that Stratagem).

abilities.name: Pack Leader
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

abilities.name: Prey of the Blood God
abilities.description: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit to be this model’s prey. Each time a model in this model’s unit makes a melee attack that targets its prey, you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model’s prey is destroyed, select one new enemy unit to be this model’s prey.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ FLESH HOUNDS

abilities.name: Daemon Lord of Slaanesh (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ^^Slaanesh Legiones Daemonica^^ unit is within 6" of this model, improve the Armour Penetration of melee weapons in that unit by 1.

abilities.name: Mesmerising Form
abilities.description: Each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Vortex Terrors (Psychic)
abilities.description: At the start of your Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to this model. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Warp Storms (Psychic)
abilities.description: At the end of your Movement phase, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 9" of one or more models with this ability: on a 3+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Taskmaster (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ^^**War Dog^^** model is within 9" of this model, each time that ^^**War Dog^^** model makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Obsessive Ruthlessness
abilities.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** unit, that attack has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abilities.name: Dread Dominion (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ^^**War Dog^^** model is within 9" of this model, improve that ^^**War Dog^^** model's Leadership  and Objective Control characteristics by 1.

abilities.name: Seething Hatred
abilities.description: Each time this model is selected to shoot or fight, you can re-roll one Hit roll or you can re-roll one Wound roll when resolving those attacks.

abilities.name: Frenzied Rampage (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ^^**War Dog^^** model is within 9" of this model, each time that ^^**War Dog^^** model makes a melee attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

abilities.name: Bloodlust
abilities.description: Each time this model makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, its melee weapons have the [Devastating Wounds] ability.

abilities.name: Methodical Destruction
abilities.description: At the start of the first battle round, select one unit from your opponent's army to be this model's victim. Each time this model makes an attack that targets its victim, you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model's victim is destroyed, select one new enemy unit to be this model's victim.

abilities.name: Close-range Killers (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ^^**War Dog^^** model is within 9" of this model, each time that ^^**War Dog^^** model makes an attack that targets the closest enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Infernal Aegis (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly ^^**War Dog^^** model is within 6" of this model, that ^^**War Dog^^** model has the Benefit of Cover.

abilities.name: Bastion of Corruption
abilities.description: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield as Reinforcements cannot be set up within 12" of this model.

abilities.name: Daemon Lord of Tzeentch (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly TZEENTCH LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Master of Magicks (Psychic)
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, select one of the following abilities: [IGNORES COVER]; [LETHAL HITS]; [SUSTAINED HITS D3]. Until the end of the phase, this model’s Bolt of Change has that ability.

abilities.name: Mischief Makers (Aura)
abilities.description: Each time an enemy unit (excluding ^^Titanic^^ units) within Engagement Range of one or more units with this ability is selected to fight, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes a melee attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Split
abilities.description: Each time a ^^Pink Horror^^ or ^^Blue Horror^^ model in this unit is destroyed, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, if this unit is not destroyed, roll one D6 for that model. On a 4+, if it was a ^^Pink Horror^^, add two ^^Blue Horror^^ models to this unit, and if it was a ^^Blue Horror^^, add one ^^Brimstone Horror^^ model to this unit.

abilities.name: Horrors are Pink. Horrors are Blue. Where once there was one, now there are two.
abilities.description:
If, at any point, this unit contains no ^^Pink Horrors^^ models, use the ^^Blue Horrors^^ datasheet for this unit. 


_Designer’s Note: While this unit contains one or more ^^Pink Horrors^^ models, the Cackling Horrors and Exploding Horrors abilities from the Blue Horrors datasheet do not apply to this unit._

abilities.name: Death’s Heads
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly NURGLE LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Infected Outbreak
abilities.description: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase and this unit is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ PLAGUEBEARERS

abilities.name: Poxbringer
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

abilities.name: Feculent Despair (Aura, Psychic)
abilities.description: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock test, subtract 1 from that test.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-20 wounds remaining
abilities.description: While this model has 1-20 wounds remaining, subtract 10 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: God-machine
abilities.description: This model is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Striding Colossus
abilities.description: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend three times that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.

abilities.name: Blood Throne
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this model. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly KHORNE LEGIONES DAEMONICA unit makes an attack that targets that unit, improve the Strength, Armour Penetration and Damage characteristics of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Champion Slayer
abilities.description: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a CHARACTER or MONSTER unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model destroys an enemy CHARACTER or MONSTER unit, this model regains up to D6 lost wounds.

abilities.name: Virulent Blessing (Psychic)
abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within 24" of and visible to this model. Until the end of the phase, each time an attack made by a NURGLE LEGIONES DAEMONICA model is allocated to a model in that unit, add 1 to the Damage characteristic of that attack.

abilities.name: Deluge of Nurgle (Aura)
abilities.description: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, subtract 2 from the Move characteristic and subtract 1 from the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Slashing Dive
abilities.description: In your Movement phase, after this unit ends a Normal move, you can select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll one D6 for each model in this unit: for each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

abilities.name: Unholy Speed
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit.

abilities.name: No Prey Can Evade
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model.

abilities.name: Monarch of the Hunt
abilities.description: At the start of the first battle round, select one enemy unit to be this model’s quarry. Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets its quarry, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model’s quarry is destroyed, select one new enemy unit to be this model’s quarry.

abilities.description: This unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.

abilities.name: Skulls of the Fallen
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Skullmaster’s Fury
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time that unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, Juggernaut’s bladed horns equipped by models in that unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability.

abilities.name: Devastating Charge
abilities.description: Each time this model’s unit ends a Charge move, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of that unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a ^^Character^^ unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model destroys an enemy ^^Character ^^unit, you gain 1CP.

abilities.description: At the start of the Fight phase, every enemy unit (excluding ^^Monsters^^ and ^^Vehicles^^) within 6" of this model must take a Battle-shock test.

This model can be attached to the following unit:

abilities.name: Keep Counting!
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

abilities.name: Meet Your Quota!
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

abilities.name: Prince of Slaanesh
abilities.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, a successful unmodified Wound roll of 5+ scores a Critical Wound.

abilities.name: Delightful Agonies
abilities.description: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield, as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

abilities.name: P’tarix’s Sorcerous Syphon (Aura)
abilities.description: While an enemy unit is within 12" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes a Psychic Attack, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Xirat’p’s Sorcerous Barrages (Psychic)
abilities.description: At the end of your Movement phase, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6" of this model: on a 2-3, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

abilities.name: Formless Horror
abilities.description: Each time an enemy unit wishes to select this model as the target of an attack, that unit must first take a Battle-shock test. If that test is failed, in addition to being Battle-shocked, that enemy unit cannot target this model this phase.

abilities.name: Mischief and Confusion
abilities.description: At the start of your opponent’s Shooting phase, select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to this model and roll one D6: on a 2-5, until the end of the phase, each time a model in that enemy unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll; on a 6, that enemy unit is not eligible to shoot this phase

abilities.name: The Eternal Dance
abilities.description:
At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within 6" of this model. Until the end of the phase:
■ Each time a friendly SLAANESH LEGIONES DAEMONICA model makes a melee attack that targets that enemy unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.
■ Each time a model in that enemy unit makes a melee attack, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Dazzling Acrobatics
abilities.description: This model is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

abilities.name: Tormentbringer (Aura)
abilities.description: While a friendly **^^Slaanesh Legions Daemonica**^^ unit is within 6" of this model, melee weapons in that unit have the [^^SUSTAINED HITS 1^^] ability.

abilities.name: Hysterical Frenzy
abilities.description: Each time a model in this model’s unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following unit: 
- ^^**Hellflayers^^**

abilities.name: Tranceweaver
abilities.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll instead.

abilities.name: Symphony of Pain (Psychic)
abilities.description: At the end of your Movement phase, you can select one enemy unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. Until the end of the turn, each time a SLAANESH LEGIONES DAEMONICA model from your army makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Leader
abilities.description:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ DAEMONETTES

abilities.name: Brigand
abilities.description: Ranged weapons equipped by this model have the [Ignores Cover] ability while targeting enemy units in range of one or more objective markers.

abilities.name: Executioner
abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. Each time an enemy unit is destroyed as the result of this model's attacks, before removing the last model in that unit from the battlefield, each other unit from your opponent's army that is within 3" of it must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Huntsman
abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a ^^**Monster^^** or ^^**Vehicle^^** unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Karnivore
abilities.description: You can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for this model.

abilities.name: Protection Protocols
abilities.description: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

abilities.name: Stalker
abilities.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets an enemy unit, if there are no other units from your opponent’s army within 6" of that target, add 1 to the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-26 wounds remaining
abilities.description: While this model has 1-26 wounds remaining, subtract 10 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Titanic Fire Support
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly IMPERIUM model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Titanic Fire Support
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly CHAOS model makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, on a Critical Wound, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

abilities.name: Striding Colossus
abilities.description: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend three times that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.

abilities.name: Flank Speed
abilities.description: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 8" to the Move characteristic of this model.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-13 wounds remaining
abilities.description: While this model has 1-13 wounds remaining, subtract 8 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Striding Colossus
abilities.description: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend twice that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.

abilities.name: Damaged: 1-33 wounds remaining
abilities.description: While this model has 1-33 wounds remaining, subtract 15 from this model’s Objective Control characteristic and each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

abilities.name: Wrath of the Omnissiah
abilities.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

abilities.name: Striding Colossus
abilities.description: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, you must spend four times that Stratagem’s stated CP cost to do so.
